message:
test(html_export): freeze full-document goldens for basic + encrypted export (bead z2hck)

Previously html_export coverage only asserted fragments of the rendered
document (a script tag here, a CSS rule there). Drift in the styles,
metadata block, or rendered message HTML could go unnoticed until a
user reported a visual regression. Bead z2hck is the "freeze the whole
exported document" track.

- Add `tests/pages_export_golden.rs`:
    * `write_fixture_session` writes a deterministic three-message
      Claude-style JSONL fixture (user + assistant + follow-up) into a
      TempDir.
    * Every test runs the real `cass` binary via `assert_cmd`,
      with `HOME`, `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`, `XDG_DATA_HOME`, and `XDG_STATE_HOME`
      pinned inside the TempDir so ambient user config cannot leak.
    * `CODING_AGENT_SEARCH_NO_UPDATE_PROMPT=1` and
      `CASS_IGNORE_SOURCES_CONFIG=1` are set so the output does not
      depend on network state or user-configured sources.
    * Scrubber normalizes line endings / trailing whitespace, replaces
      absolute paths rooted in the TempDir with `[TEST_HOME]`, rewrites
      UUIDs, ISO-8601 timestamps, version stamps, and base64-encoded
      encrypted payload bytes (salt/IV/ciphertext) with
      `[SCRUBBED-*]` placeholders.
    * Two tests:
        - `basic_export_html`: plain `cass export-html --json --no-cdns`
        - `encrypted_export_html`: adds `--encrypt --password
          correct-horse-battery-staple` and sets
          `CASS_HTML_EXPORT_DETERMINISTIC_SEED=cass-z2hck-html-export-golden-v1`
          so the frozen golden is stable across runs.

- Freeze the two scrubbed documents under
  `tests/golden/html_export/{basic,encrypted}_export.html.golden`
  (71 KB and 74 KB respectively). Regenerate with
  `UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --test pages_export_golden`.

- Extend `tests/golden/PROVENANCE.md`:
    * Add the new regen commands (with and without a specific test
      name).
    * Document the `[SCRUBBED-*]` placeholder for encryption output.
    * Add the two per-file provenance sections describing exactly how
      each golden was produced, including the TempDir pinning and (for
      the encrypted variant) the deterministic seed.

These goldens will now fail if anything in the HTML export pipeline
changes the document: template tweaks, style changes, message-rendering
output, metadata block, bundled scripts, or the shape of the encrypted
payload.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,9 +10,11 @@ that requires re-approval.
 ```bash
 # Regenerate every golden
 UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --test golden_robot_json
+UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --test pages_export_golden
 
 # Regenerate a specific test
 UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --test golden_robot_json -- capabilities_json
+UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --test pages_export_golden -- basic_export_html
 
 # After regeneration, review and commit
 git diff tests/golden/
@@ -31,6 +33,7 @@ Dynamic values are scrubbed before golden comparison — see
 | ISO-8601 timestamps | `[TIMESTAMP]` | Non-deterministic |
 | Paths rooted at the isolated test HOME | `[TEST_HOME]` | Test-dir specific |
 | UUIDs | `[UUID]` | Non-deterministic |
+| HTML export salt / IV / ciphertext | `[SCRUBBED-*]` | Keeps encrypted payload shape without freezing secret material |
 
 Keys are also sorted and the payload is re-indented by
 `serde_json::to_string_pretty` so whitespace / key-order drift is not
@@ -50,6 +53,27 @@ contract surface: `api_version`, `contract_version`, `features` list,
 an isolated TempDir and `CASS_IGNORE_SOURCES_CONFIG=1` so no ambient
 sources leak into the output.
 
+### `html_export/basic_export.html.golden`
+
+Frozen full document from `cass export-html --json --no-cdns`
+against a three-message Claude-style JSONL fixture generated by
+`tests/pages_export_golden.rs::write_fixture_session`. Captures the doctype,
+metadata, style block, script block, and rendered user/assistant message HTML.
+
+**Command:** `cass export-html <fixture.jsonl> --output-dir <temp> --filename basic_export.html --json --no-cdns`
+with `HOME`, `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`, and `XDG_DATA_HOME` pinned to an isolated
+TempDir.
+
+### `html_export/encrypted_export.html.golden`
+
+Frozen full document from the same fixture and flags plus `--encrypt
+--password correct-horse-battery-staple`. Test builds set
+`CASS_HTML_EXPORT_DETERMINISTIC_SEED=cass-z2hck-html-export-golden-v1` so
+salt/IV/ciphertext are reproducible before the scrubber replaces those bytes
+with `[SCRUBBED-*]` placeholders.
+
+**Command:** `cass export-html <fixture.jsonl> --output-dir <temp> --filename encrypted_export.html --json --no-cdns --encrypt --password correct-horse-battery-staple`.
+
 ## Follow-ups
 
 Goldens still to add under bead u9osp scope (each needs its own
